title: Fix follow/unfollow in Explore by returning user Principal IDs from search

requirements.text: Update the backend user search API so the frontend can identify each search result by Principal, enabling follow/unfollow calls that require a Principal.

quotes: in this i cant follow anyone.

acceptanceCriteria: Backend exposes a query method that returns search results including each matched user's Principal (UserId) along with the user’s profile fields needed by the Explore UI.
The method is callable by authenticated users (same permission expectations as the existing searchUsers).
No changes to existing stable data (users, followers/following arrays) are required to support this method.

requirements.text: Wire Explore page follow/unfollow to the backend using Principals from search results, and remove the current disabled follow/unfollow UI state.

quotes: in this i cant follow anyone.

acceptanceCriteria: Explore search results include a reliable identifier for each user (Principal as text) that is used when invoking follow/unfollow mutations.
Follow/Unfollow buttons are enabled for other users (disabled only while the relevant mutation is in-flight).
After following or unfollowing a user, the Explore results update to reflect the new relationship state without requiring a full page refresh.
The current user cannot follow themselves (no follow button shown for the signed-in user).
Any follow/unfollow error from the backend is shown to the user in English (not only logged to console).

requirements.text: Enable “Start chat” from Explore by using the searched user’s Principal ID, consistent with how startConversation expects a Principal.

quotes: in this i cant follow anyone.

acceptanceCriteria: “Start chat” is enabled for other users and starts a conversation using the selected user’s Principal ID.
On success, the app navigates to the created conversation thread route.
On failure, an English error message is presented to the user.

constraints: Backend must remain a single Motoko actor with all logic in backend/main.mo.

Do not edit frontend immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Do not add new social features beyond making follow/unfollow (and associated Explore chat button) work.
Do not introduce real-time messaging (WebSockets) or third-party auth providers.
Do not redesign the overall navigation structure.
